authors: Slavin KV, North RB, Deer TR, Staats P, Davis K, Diaz R
title: Tonic and burst spinal cord stimulation waveforms for the treatment of chronic, intractable pain: study protocol for a randomized controlled trial
study_question: Is burst stimulation noninferior to tonic stimulation for chronic neuropathic pain after 12 weeks?
population_assessed: Adults with chronic intractable neuropathic trunk and/or limb pain, successful tonic trial candidates
follow_up_duration: 24 weeks controlled; every 6 months up to 2 years
outcome_measures: Overall VAS, trunk VAS, limb VAS, BDI-II, PCS, ODI, paresthesia, satisfaction, preference
inclusion_criteria: Adults 22+, neuropathic trunk/limb pain, VAS at least 60, failed treatments, stable medications
